_publications._publicationTitle: Single-cell multiomics identifies clinically relevant mesenchymal stem-like cells and key regulators for MPNST malignancy.

_contextSnippet: by in vivo xenograft assays, we showed that lentivirus short hairpin RNA (shRNA)–mediated knockdown of ZEB1 impeded the tumor growth of an MPNST cell line when compared with control shRNA
details: Lentivirus shRNA-mediated knockdown of ZEB1 impeded tumor growth of MPNST cell line compared with control shRNA in xenograft assays
